subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast journeyed from God unto God! Verily, I commune with my All-Glorious Lord every morn and eve with a tongue [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من سافر من الله الی الله انی لاناجی ربی الابهی فی کل صباح و مساء بلسان
subcodes.subjects: @soul; spirit after death, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @firmness in the Covenant
